name: TG/TSF Factory
description:
You find yourself on a conveyer belt in an unknown factory, where kidnapped guys who go "missing" are turned into various hot, female fictional characters, brainwashed, then sent off to be sold to the highest bidder.

Will you attempt to escape? Or surrender?

There's a fair bit of lore behind the factory, try to figure out it's secrets before you're a copy of your waifu being sold to the highest bidder.
creator: DragonSmoocher
